title: EaseonSS - DropBooster
description: Multiply monster drop items by 1-100x. Configurable in-game with commands.
body:
# 🌿 Easeon - Drop Booster **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview Drop Booster is a server-side Fabric mod that allows server administrators to multiply monster loot drops. Perfect for multiplayer servers and singleplayer worlds that want enhanced farming and resource gathering experiences.
## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission. | Command | Description | | ------------------------------ | ------------------------ | | /easeon dropbooster | View current setting | | /easeon dropbooster <1-100> | Change drop multiplier |
Configuration ```json { "value": 2, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.dropbooster.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
